description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to a random enemy 5 times. Each hit inflicts Stun for [1 sec->0.6 sec]. When landing a Critical Hit, restores Mana by 100. Non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG per [Ember] stack.
Deals Magic DMG to enemies in the target area and inflicts Stun for [2 sec->1.2 sec]. Non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG per [Ember] stack. Inflicts 12 Ember stacks on hit targets.
Deals Magic DMG to all enemies 5 times. This attack applies Critical DMG 150% higher, and non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG per [Ember] stack.
On hit, applies an [Ember] stack to the target. When attacking a target at max stacks, restores Mana by 30. [Ember] : Deals Magic Damage over Time every 1 sec for 20 sec, and stacks up to 12 times.

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage increases by 100%.
When there are 5 or more enemies, Mana cost is reduced by [2->2000] for 10 sec. This effect can only trigger once every 10 sec.
Every 10 sec, stuns one enemy with [Ember] for [2 sec->1.2 sec]. If the target has 10 or more [Ember] stacks, stuns for [3 sec->1.8 sec] instead.

description.unified: [Fire Ball] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.
Attack Speed increases by {0}, and Skill Attacks deal additional Magic DMG equal to {1}% of ATK per [Ember] stack on the target.
